mapper.sql: id, segment_id, canonical_symbol, sort_order, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_segment_member (segment_id, canonical_symbol, sort_order, remark) VALUES (#{segmentId}, #{canonicalSymbol}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO market_segment_member (segment_id, canonical_symbol, sort_order, remark) VALUES
(#{item.segmentId}, #{item.canonicalSymbol}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM market_segment_member WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId} AND canonical_symbol = #{canonicalSymbol}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_segment_member WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_segment_member WHERE segment_id = #{segmentId}
